doc_content.summary: The stark-session skill provides session lifecycle management to streamline daily workflows. It bootstraps a coding session with a tailored briefing based on git, PR state, and health checks, and reliably wraps up work by running tests, merging PRs, committing documentation, and pushing code.
key_features: Silent initialization of project context, guidelines, and memory
Automated reporting of clean/dirty git state and open PRs via a concise briefing
Non-blocking health checks, tests, and builds run at start and end of sessions
Interactive PR merging and automated document staging (with devlog integration) on session end
Graceful failure handling that prefers prompting the user over blocking execution

alt_text: A visualization of the stark-session skill, showing two main workflows: Start Mode for gathering context and presenting a briefing, and End Mode for running tests, merging PRs, committing docs, and pushing code.
